snippet: Dear, This is fine for me and see you tomorrow. Kind regards, Evelyn Worms L'Hermitage NV Sint Jobsteenweg 21 B 2970 Schilde 0475/677 696 From: Denys Maiorov <denisvalerievichmayorov1@gmail.com
subject: RE: Meeting on Thursday and document confirmation
body:
Dear,

This is fine for me and see you tomorrow.

Kind regards,


Evelyn Worms
L’Hermitage N.V.
Sint Jobsteenweg 21 B
2970  Schilde
0475/677 696

From: Denys Maiorov <denisvalerievichmayorov1@gmail.com>
Sent: woensdag 18 februari 2026 12:38
To: Info - L'hermitage <info@lhermitage.be>
Subject: Meeting on Thursday and document confirmation

Dear Ms. Worms,

Thank you for your message.

Yes, Thursday at 13:00 works very well for me.

I will send you the document confirming the transfer to the blocked account a bit later.

Kind regards,
Denys Maiorov
